free.title: Email Writer
free.prompt: Write a professional email about {topic}. The tone should be {tone}. Keep it concise and actionable.

free.title: Blog Post Generator
free.prompt: Create a detailed blog post outline about {topic}. Include: introduction, 3-5 main sections with bullet points, and a conclusion.

free.title: Social Media Post
free.prompt: Write a {platform} post about {topic}. Make it engaging with emojis and relevant hashtags. Target audience: {audience}.

free.title: Code Explainer
free.prompt: Explain this code in simple terms: {code}. Break it down step by step.

free.title: Product Description
free.prompt: Write a compelling product description for {product}. Highlight key benefits and features. Target audience: {audience}.

free.title: Meeting Notes
free.prompt: Summarize these meeting notes: {notes}. Extract key decisions, action items with owners, and next steps.

premium.title: SEO Blog Optimizer
premium.description: Optimize blog posts for SEO with keyword research integration
premium.prompt: Optimize this blog post for SEO: {content}. Focus on keyword: {keyword}. Include meta description, title tag suggestions, and content improvements.

premium.title: Sales Email Sequence
premium.prompt: Create a 5-email sales sequence for {product/offer}. Email 1: Introduction. Email 2: Value prop. Email 3: Case study. Email 4: Objection handling. Email 5: Urgency/close.

premium.title: Video Script Generator
premium.description: Generate YouTube/TikTok video scripts with hooks
premium.prompt: Write a {platform} video script about {topic}. Length: {duration}. Include: attention-grabbing hook in first 3 seconds, main content, call-to-action. Add visual cues in [brackets].

premium.title: Landing Page Copy
premium.prompt: Write landing page copy for {product}. Include: compelling headline, subheadline, benefits section (3-5 bullet points), social proof section, and CTA.

premium.title: Interview Question Generator
premium.prompt: Generate 10 interview questions for {role} position. Include: 3 behavioral questions, 3 technical questions, 2 situational questions, 2 culture fit questions. Add expected answers.

premium.title: Press Release Writer
premium.prompt: Write a press release for: {announcement}. Follow AP style. Include: compelling headline, dateline, lead paragraph, quotes, company boilerplate, media contact info.

premium.title: Business Plan Generator
premium.prompt: Create a business plan outline for: {business idea}. Include: executive summary, market analysis, competitive landscape, marketing strategy, financial projections, funding requirements.

premium.title: API Documentation Writer
premium.prompt: Write API documentation for: {API description}. Include: overview, authentication, endpoints with request/response examples, error codes, rate limits.
